name: @ahmedrowaihi/glean
description: Glean — reverse-engineer OpenAPI 3.1 specs from traffic observed in your DevTools.

scripts.install:chrome: pnpm --filter @ahmedrowaihi/openapi-recon build && wxt build && node scripts/install-chrome.mjs
scripts.install:firefox: pnpm --filter @ahmedrowaihi/openapi-recon build && wxt build -b firefox && node scripts/install-firefox.mjs
scripts.icons: for s in 16 32 48 96 128; do rsvg-convert -w $s -h $s branding/icon.svg -o public/icon/$s.png; done
